Both Sthaviras had together five disciples :

a. Arya Indradatta (Pr. Indadinna) of the Kásyapa gotra, LIST OF THE STHAVIRAS, 293 b. Priyagantha, founder of the Madhyamá SAakha, c. Vidyádharagopála of the Kásyapa gotra, founder of the Vidyádhart .Sákhá, d: Azshidatta, e. Arhaddatta (Pr. Arihadatta).
